problem_title: Travel Rule data remains disconnected from cases
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle with slow reviews and incomplete audit trails when Travel Rule messages and exception data are kept separate from case workflows. This fragmentation hampers efficient risk assessment and complicates regulatory reporting for VASPs.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY links Travel Rule messages, exception events, provider outputs and reviewer actions into structured cases with a clear audit trail to support faster risk assessments and streamlined regulatory reporting workflows.
workflow_title: From Travel Rule exception to case evidence
workflow_description: SFTY links Travel Rule message exceptions through case creation, review, evidence preservation and reporting to maintain audit trail and support compliance operations.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit

faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides VASP teams with a connected compliance layer that connects Travel Rule, KYC, KYT, cases, evidence and reporting into structured operational workflows for better oversight and control.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY connect Travel Rule data?
faq_2_answer: SFTY aggregates Travel Rule messages, routing data and exceptions into case workflows, linking originator and beneficiary details with alerts and decisions to streamline review and approval processes.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and supporting evidence for Travel Rule events to maintain a clear audit trail for regulatory review and internal compliance assessments.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY works above existing providers and compliance tools, orchestrating their outputs into one operational system without replacing current integrations or workflows.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace Travel Rule providers but connects their outputs into structured workflows, cases and reports to improve operational efficiency and audit readiness.
final_title: Connect Travel Rule data into structured cases
final_description: Review how SFTY organizes provider outputs, exception handling, audit logs and reporting into one operational compliance layer.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
